name: ai4ss-skills
description: Research infrastructure for agent-assisted social science: reusable skills, .aiss research objects, validation gates, and bounded handoff workflows.

interface.longDescription: Bundle AI4SS skills for inspectable social-science work: research routing, MIDA study design, literature and data gates, analysis readiness, methods review, writing scaffolds, slides, reviewer-response matrices, and specialist support.
defaultPrompt: Use AI4SS Skills to turn this rough research topic into candidate routes and the next executable action.
Use AI4SS Skills to check whether this analysis is ready to run and produce an analysis manifest.
Use AI4SS Skills to audit this social-science design with bounded claims.
